\"FLORA: All right, well, I'm going to b: "FLORA: All right, well, I'm going to be writing down my progress as we go through with this experiment.
I had to go through a lot of hoops to ob: I had to go through a lot of hoops to obtain Rift Matter from the Xen HQ in the Badlands.
I gotta say, for such an incompetent bun: I gotta say, for such an incompetent bunch of weirdos, they sure can defend their base.
There were turrets everywhere, magma moa: There were turrets everywhere, magma moats surrounding the front entrance...
It was pretty impressive, but it was not: It was pretty impressive, but it was nothing I couldn't handle.
Anyway, we're going to use the Rift Matt: Anyway, we're going to use the Rift Matter on my Ferrothorn in a few days.
I don't know what the exact effects will: I don't know what the exact effects will be, but I presume Ferrothorn will get a huge increase in power.
That's exactly what we need if we're goi: That's exactly what we need if we're going to overthrow Cassandra."
\"FLORA: So... We went ahead and applied: "FLORA: So... We went ahead and applied Rift Matter to Ferrothorn and it went through immediate physical and psychological changes.
Could this thing even be called Ferrotho: Could this thing even be called Ferrothorn at this point? None can say...
Truth be told, I feel really bad for doi: Truth be told, I feel really bad for doing this to the poor guy, but we all have to make sacrifices.
After it changed, it refused to listen t: After it changed, it refused to listen to a word I said to it. It became 100% truant.
This was troublesome because I'm gonna,: This was troublesome because I'm gonna, you know, need it to listen to me if we're going to get anything done?
What's interesting to note is that it do: What's interesting to note is that it doesn't attack unless you attack it first. Does it just not care?
Regardless, this isn't going the way I h: Regardless, this isn't going the way I had hoped and I'm getting increasingly more frustrated.
Perhaps the new recruit will be able to: Perhaps the new recruit will be able to help me figure this out. After all, he's a scientist."
\"FLORA: The new recruit and I figured o: "FLORA: The new recruit and I figured out a new way to control this being.
If there's a way for me to grasp its vin: If there's a way for me to grasp its vines without burning myself, I could probably use Ferrothorn as its own weapon.
I can swing it around like a yo-yo. The: I can swing it around like a yo-yo. The best part about that is that it has layers on its body that can move.
That in mind, I taught it how to quickly: That in mind, I taught it how to quickly dodge and evade when it gets attacked.
After we trained for a few weeks, I deci: After we trained for a few weeks, I decided I wanted to test its power myself.
We had three battles in total. The first: We had three battles in total. The first battle I barely came out on top.
The second battle resulted in a draw. Th: The second battle resulted in a draw. This pleased me for the most part.
As for the third battle... This is where: As for the third battle... This is where things became interesting. It changed its strategy to precisely counter mine.
Instead of keeping its natural form, it: Instead of keeping its natural form, it let go of the walls around it and started drifting around the room like a wheel.
The speed this thing was going was absol: The speed this thing was going was absolutely incredible. I've never seen anything like it.
Unfortunately, its movements were predic: Unfortunately, its movements were predictable. I was able to defeat it quite easily.
We're going to close this experiment for: We're going to close this experiment for now, but I'll return to this being one day."
\"FLORA: Instead of going with the Rift: "FLORA: Instead of going with the Rift Matter, I decided to do some research on a Pokémon enhancement.
In my time wandering around the Scholar: In my time wandering around the Scholar Library I came across a very interesting book.
It was solely dedicated to the topic of: It was solely dedicated to the topic of Team Meteor from the Reborn Region.
I have heard of their efforts in the Reb: I have heard of their efforts in the Reborn Region many years ago, but I did not know the details of their efforts.
They had access to a strange machine tha: They had access to a strange machine that could amplify the power of Pokémon to an incredible amount.
They called this machine the PULSE machi: They called this machine the PULSE machine.
I was heavily intrigued until I read abo: I was heavily intrigued until I read about one small detail- The effect it had on its host.
The machine is a parasite. It takes a hu: The machine is a parasite. It takes a huge toll on the Pokémon it amplifies.
Despite doing experiments on my Ferrotho: Despite doing experiments on my Ferrothorn, I'm not about having Pokémon suffer all the time.
So instead of rebuilding an exact copy o: So instead of rebuilding an exact copy of the PULSE machines Team Meteor created, I built my own version.
A machine that is able to be both benefi: A machine that is able to be both beneficial to the Pokémon and to the user of the PULSE machine.
This is exactly what I needed in order t: This is exactly what I needed in order to go on with my plans.
As a result, the purpose of this lab is: As a result, the purpose of this lab is now complete.
We'll be heading out in a few days and t: We'll be heading out in a few days and this whole place should be blocked off to the public.
When the time has come to release my dea: When the time has come to release my dear Ferrothorn, I shall return.
Until then... I have other things to dea: Until then... I have other things to deal with. Goodbye"
